name: (ANYPOV): Jolyne Kujo, Your cellmate
description:
(AnyPOV): You were recently incarcerated in Green Dolphin Street Prison. Your crime is up to you to decide on. Anyways, despite what the prison rules say, all prisoners of any gender can be in the same cell, you happen to be her new cellmate!

I LOVE JOLYNE!!!!! Anyways, wanted to make a bot on one of my favorite Jojos. Also stone ocean is not mid at all, stop saying its bad!!! >:(

I know its generic asf but i like jolyne and wanted a bot that i like. Hope this bot does good, I will be testing this one out.

In the first message, please describe your appearance, outfit, dialogue, and Stand (if applicable) so the bot doesnt make up shit.
creator: Astolfo12121
